PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?president ?presidentLabel ?party ?partyLabel WHERE {
  ?president wdt:P39 wd:Q312271 .
  ?president p:P39 ?officeStmt .
  ?officeStmt ps:P39 wd:Q312271 .
  ?officeStmt pq:P580 ?start .
  ?officeStmt pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(STR(?start) >= "1991-01-01")
  OPTIONAL {
    ?president wdt:P102 ?party .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?president rdfs:label ?presidentLabel
    FILTER(lang(?presidentLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?party rdfs:label ?partyLabel
    FILTER(lang(?partyLabel) = 'en')
    FILTER(?partyLabel != "Communist Party of the Soviet Union")
  }
}
ORDER BY ?start
